primary_issue.title: Require PR readiness review before finish-work publishes
primary_issue.reason: intake/handoff 主 issue，默认进入 close 候选。
acceptance_evidence: trellis/workflows/guru-team/scripts/python/guru_team_trellis.py 已阻塞 non-draft generated body source，并要求 --body-file 或 --body-artifact。
finish-work 已在 archive 前做 reviewed source preflight，并在 archive 后把 active task source path 重写到 archived task artifact。
readiness artifact 现在要求 ready=true；相对 body_file 按 artifact 所在目录解析。
test_guru_team_trellis.py 覆盖 non-draft publish/finish-work 缺少 reviewed source 失败、draft preview 允许 generated、archive 后路径重写、artifact 相对 body_file。
workflow、README、preset README、finish-work overlays 和 dogfood copies 已同步 #7 门禁，并通过 dogfood overlay drift check。
